discovery.problem: Automatizar la gestión de turnos odontológicos mediante un bot de Telegram integrado con servicios de calendario, reduciendo la carga operativa del profesional, minimizando la tasa de inasistencias y brindando una experiencia ágil y accesible para los pacientes.
discovery.scale: single_user (inferred, low confidence — SaaS model described but v1.0 targets one professional)
discovery.stack: FastAPI + PostgreSQL + n8n + Telegram Bot API + Google Calendar API + APScheduler

recommended.name: fastapi
recommended.reason: Stack includes FastAPI; provides best practices and conventions.

recommended.name: saas-multi-tenant
recommended.reason: System type is SaaS with multi-tenant potential.

recommended.name: supabase-postgres-best-practices
recommended.reason: Stack includes PostgreSQL; provides performance optimization and best practices.

recommended.name: devops-engineer
recommended.reason: needs_infra is true; covers Docker, CI/CD, and deployment.

recommended.name: telegram-bot
recommended.reason: Core integration via Telegram Bot API.

recommended.name: google-calendar
recommended.reason: Core integration via Google Calendar API.
